steps.title: Use the source relationship
steps.content: The second sentence says modern Hawaiian writers have drawn on traditional Native Hawaiian stories to create their work. The blank must show that modern Hawaiian literature developed from those earlier stories.

steps.title: Reject wrong source meanings
steps.content: A means dwelled on anxiously, not developed from. B means replaced, but the writers use the stories rather than supplant them. C means anticipated or came before, which reverses the timeline because the traditional stories came first. The answer is D.
